reviews.comment:
Los playeros mas lentos del mundo para cargar y cobrar, encima siempre tratan de venderte q cambies las escobillas del auto. Solo sirve cargar aca si sos socio del ACA x el descuento, nada mas. Si no fuera socio cargaria en otra YPF

(Translated by Google)
The slowest beachcombers in the world at loading and charging, and they're always trying to sell you the car's wiper blades. Charging here is only valid if you're an ACA member, just because of the discount. If I weren't a member, I'd charge at another YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR3b3F6UE53EAE

reviews.comment:
Sin turno ni te miran el auto y tenes que pedir por favor que te den una franja horaria,  porque el turno es dejamelo a las 8 am y te aviso cuando esta

(Translated by Google)
Without an appointment, they don't even look at your car and you have to ask them to give you a time slot, because the appointment is: leave it at 8 am and I'll let you know when it's ready.
